query: TITLE-ABS-KEY(("weather forecast*" OR "weather prediction*" OR "meteorological forecast*" OR "temperature forecast*" OR "heat forecast*" OR "early warning system*" OR "heat warning*" OR "heat alert*" OR "climate forecast*" OR "seasonal forecast*" OR "extreme heat forecast*") AND ("cooling cent*" OR "cooling shelter*" OR "heat shelter*" OR "cooling station*" OR "air conditioning cent*" OR "public cooling" OR "community cooling" OR "emergency cooling" OR "refuge cent*" OR "climate shelter*" OR "respite cent*") AND ("temperature mortality" OR "temperature-mortality" OR "heat mortality" OR "heat-health" OR "temperature morbidity" OR "heat illness" OR "heat-related death*" OR "thermal stress" OR "heat stroke" OR "hyperthermia" OR "excess mortality" OR "heat wave mortality") AND ("randomized controlled trial*" OR "randomised controlled trial*" OR "RCT" OR "quasi-experimental" OR "natural experiment*" OR "regression discontinuity" OR "instrumental variable*" OR "difference-in-differences" OR "random* assignment" OR "random allocation" OR "causal inference" OR "causal identification" OR "intervention study" OR "policy evaluation" OR "program* evaluation" OR "exogenous variation" OR "plausibly exogenous" OR "treatment assignment" OR "control group" OR "impact evaluation" OR "treatment effect*" OR "counterfactual"))
